topics.title: AI Infrastructure
topics.executive_summary: <cite index="3-3">AI firms are investing heavily in energy-efficiency infrastructure to manage soaring datacenter power demands</cite>, while <cite index="4-7">Iris Energy (IREN) announced it's using digital twins to validate deployment of 50,000+ NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPUs</cite>.
topics.stories:
[
  {
    "headline": "AI Data Centers Face 20% Power Efficiency Gains via New Sidecars",
    "body": "<cite index="3-11,3-13">NVIDIA is deploying new power conversion sidecars that consolidate AC-to-DC conversion outside racks, improving energy efficiency by 20% compared to current systems</cite>. <cite index="3-13,3-14">With a 1 megawatt sidecar, racks can reach 500 kilowatts, roughly ten times more than before</cite>.",
    "source_url": "https://www.bloomberg.com/graphics/2026-ai-data-center-redesign/",
    "source_name": "Bloomberg",

    "headline": "IREN Tests 50,000+ Blackwell GPUs Using AI-Powered Digital Twins",
    "body": "<cite index="4-7">Iris Energy announced a digital twin of its AI cloud using DSX Air simulation, allowing teams to trial network designs for 50,000+ NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPUs and reduce integration risk before physical deployment</cite>.",
